title: Relevance of Fly Me to the Moon
display_title: Relevance of Fly Me to the Moon
wikitext:
[]: Relevance of "Fly Me to the Moon"             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Jul 13, 2007 6:15 am Searched forums, didn't find much. Checked Evacommentary, read this: [url]http://www.evacommentary.org/ed/ed.html[/url], and subsequently wept that it had already been done somewhat. But let's open the floor anyway. Random song choice? Do the love song elements have any importance to any of the characters? Is it just yet another Rei/Moon connection? A subtle tribute to the by-product of the First Impact? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Fri Jul 13, 2007 7:33 am Yeah, it does make me feel that there may be a romance element. Then again, Rei has a prominent place in the first film, so, yes, it could just be a reference. But then, that wouldn't make it entirely Newbie friendly. New people to the series won't be aware of the Rei/Moon connection.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Jul 13, 2007 10:10 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Yeah, it does make me feel that there may be a romance element. Then again, Rei has a prominent place in the first film, so, yes, it could just be a reference. But then, that wouldn't make it entirely Newbie friendly. New people to the series won't be aware of the Rei/Moon connection.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 13, 2007 10:18 am well there is the whole "Lilith made the moon, and Rei IS Lilith" thing...

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Fri Jul 13, 2007 10:48 am I'm pretty much talking about the original, not the new movies.

[]: Relevance of "Fly Me to the Moon"             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Jul 13, 2007 6:15 am Searched forums, didn't find much. Checked Evacommentary, read this: [url]http://www.evacommentary.org/ed/ed.html[/url], and subsequently wept that it had already been done somewhat. But let's open the floor anyway. Random song choice? Do the love song elements have any importance to any of the characters? Is it just yet another Rei/Moon connection? A subtle tribute to the by-product of the First Impact? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Fri Jul 13, 2007 7:33 am Yeah, it does make me feel that there may be a romance element. Then again, Rei has a prominent place in the first film, so, yes, it could just be a reference. But then, that wouldn't make it entirely Newbie friendly. New people to the series won't be aware of the Rei/Moon connection.
